title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF FORT CORCUERA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALABANG, PROVINCE OF LANAO, TO FORT JOSE ABAD SANTOS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2916 / 53 OG No. 15, 4773 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1637, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF FORT CORCUERA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALABANG, PROVINCE OF LANAO, TO FORT JOSE ABAD SANTOS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Fort Corcuera in the Municipality of Malabang, Province of Lanao, is changed to Fort Jose Abad Santos.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
